# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      pre_build_commands:
        description: 'Commands to run before the build (one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      build_commands:
        description: 'Build commands to execute (one per line)'
        required: true
        type: string
      post_build_commands:
        description: 'Commands to run after the build (one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for commands'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: '.'
      shell_type:
        description: 'Shell to use for executing commands'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - bash
          - sh
          - pwsh
          - python
        default: 'bash'
      environment_variables:
        description: 'Environment variables (KEY=VALUE format, one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      node_version:
        description: 'Node.js version (if needed)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      python_version:
        description: 'Python version (if needed)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      java_version:
        description: 'Java version (if needed)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      timeout_minutes:
        description: 'Job timeout in minutes'
        required: false
        type: number
        default: 60
      runner_os:
        description: 'Runner operating system'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - ubuntu-latest
          - windows-latest
          - macos-latest
        default: 'ubuntu-latest'

jobs:
  custom-build:
    runs-on: ${{ inputs.runner_os }}
    timeout-minutes: ${{ inputs.timeout_minutes }}
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: inputs.node_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ inputs.node_version }}

      - name: Setup Python
        if: inputs.python_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ inputs.python_version }}

      - name: Setup Java
        if: inputs.java_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ inputs.java_version }}

      - name: Set environment variables
        if: inputs.environment_variables != ''
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Setting custom environment variables..."
          echo "${{ inputs.environment_variables }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Run pre-build commands
        if: inputs.pre_build_commands != ''
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          echo "Executing pre-build commands..."
          ${{ inputs.pre_build_commands }}

      - name: Run build commands
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          echo "Executing build commands..."
          ${{ inputs.build_commands }}

      - name: Run post-build commands
        if: inputs.post_build_commands != ''
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          echo "Executing post-build commands..."
          ${{ inputs.post_build_commands }}

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ github.run_number }}
          path: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
          retention-days: 7
